zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Polly Chapman於1772年出生在美國維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克時，她的父親Joseph Chapman32歲，母親Catherine Anderson20歲。她和Joshua Griffith至少有9個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1809年在美國南卡羅來納州紐貝利享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: Chapman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a merchant or trader, Middle English chap(pe)man, chepman, Old English cēapmann, cēpemann, a compound of cēap ‘barter, bargain, price, property’ + mann ‘man’.
Jewish: adopted probably for a like-sounding or like-meaning name in some other European language; see for example   Kaufman  .

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. John Chapmen (sic) was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

variants.name: Kaufman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Chaim, Emanuel, Moshe, Eytan, Herschel, Zvi, Ari, Aron.
Americanized form of German   Kaufmann  , and a variant of the same Jewish surname.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name Kaufman meaning ‘merchant’. Compare Koyfman 2.

variants.name: Chipman
meanings: English: from Middle English chipman (Old English cȳp(e)mann), a side form of chapman, chepman ‘merchant, trader’; see Chapman , with which this name was interchangeable.

variants.name: Copeman
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): patronymic from the early Middle English personal name Cop(e)man, an Anglicized form of Old Scandinavian Kaupmaðr. It is a transferred use of Old Scandinavian kaupmaðr (Old Danish køpman) ‘merchant’, cognate with Old English cēapmann (see Chapman ), but there is no evidence for the occupational term in Middle English.
Americanized form of North German   Koopmann   or Dutch   Koopman  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Polly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Molly , established as an independent given name since the 18th century. The reason for the interchange of M- and P- is not clear; compare Peg .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Sullivan's Island
historicEvents.description: On June 28, 1776, the Battle of Sullivan's Island takes place on Sullivan's Island, South Carolina. Since it is so close to Charelston, the battle is sometimes referred to as the First Siege of Charleston. This is the first time that the Americans had a victory against a land and sea attack by the British.

historicEvents.title: A Free America
historicEvents.description: The Revolutionary War ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris which gave the new nation boundries on which they could expand and trade with other countries without any problems.

historicEvents.title: Becomes the 10th state
historicEvents.description: On June 25, 1788 Virginia became the 10th state.

historicEvents.title: Creating the Eleventh Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Eleventh Amendment restricts the ability of any people to start a lawsuit against the states in federal court.

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.
France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.

historicEvents.title: The U.S doubles in size
historicEvents.description: The United States purchased all the Louisiana territory (828,000 sq. mi) from France, only paying 15 million dollars (A quarter trillion today) for the land. In the purchase, the US obtained the land that makes up 15 US states and 2 Canadian Provinces. The United States originally wanted to purchase of New Orleans and the lands located on the coast around it, but quickly accepted the bargain that Napoleon Bonaparte offered.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Polly Chapman was born in 1772, in Frederick, Virginia, United States, her father, Joseph Chapman, was 32 and her mother, Catherine Anderson, was 20. She had at least 9 sons and 1 daughter with Joshua Griffith. She died in 1809, in Newberry, South Carolina, United States, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Polly Chapman est née en 1772, à Frederick, Virginie, États-Unis, son père, Joseph Chapman, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Catherine Anderson, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille avec Joshua Griffith. Elle est décédée en 1809, à Newberry, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Polly Chapman 1772 in Frederick, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Joseph Chapman 32 und ihre Mutter Catherine Anderson 20. Sie hatte mit Joshua Griffith mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1809 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Newberry, South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Polly Chapmanが1772年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州フレデリックで生まれた時，父Joseph Chapmanは32歳，母Catherine Andersonは20歳であった。彼女はJoshua Griffithとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1809年にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州ニューバーリーで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Polly Chapman(이)가 1772년 미국 버지니아 주 프레더릭크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Joseph Chapman(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Anderson(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Joshua Griffith(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1809년 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 뉴베리에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Polly Chapman родилась в 1772 г. в местности фредирикк, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Joseph Chapman было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Anderson, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь от Joshua Griffith. Она умерла в 1809 г. в местности нюбирри, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 37 лет.
